name: Best-Ever BBQ Ribs
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds pork baby back ribs, cut into serving-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ribs in an aluminum foil-lined large baking pan.
2. In a small bowl, combine brown sugar, celery seed, and salt. Press firmly onto both sides of the ribs.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 1 hour.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine sauce ingredients. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
5. Remove ribs from the oven and pour off any drippings.
6. Spoon sauce over ribs, spreading evenly to coat.
7. Continue baking for 20 to 25 minutes, or until ribs are tender.
